test_sufficiency_summary: Direct lifecycle tests cover selection clearing, redraw, single bookkeeping clear, and winner-ordering; seam wiring and suite registration/linking are also verified, and `cd tests/tactical && make clean && make && ./TacticalTests` passed with OK (72 tests).
documentation_accuracy_summary: AGENTS.md and doc/DesignNotes.md accurately describe the extracted additive cleanup seam, preserved wx/model ownership split, focused regression coverage, and 72-test validation without overstating broader runtime migration.
